mapper.select: /* adm-master-equipment-sql-oracle.xml selectPkTAdminMstEq */ SELECT APKEY , EQKEY , EQTYPE , PRTYPE , IPADDR , EQNM , DLVRYCORP , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_EQ WHERE APKEY = #{apkey} AND EQKEY = #{eqkey} AND PRTYPE = #{prtype}
/* adm-master-equipment-sql-oracle.xml selectTAdminMstCt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , CTKEY , CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y'

/* adm-master-equipment-sql-oracle.xml selectTAdminMstEqxct */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , C.CTKEY , C.CTNM , A.APKEY , A.EQKEY , A.EQNM , A.IPADDR , A.PRTYPE FROM TADMIN_MST_EQ A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_EQXCT B ON B.APKEY = A.APKEY AND B.EQKEY = A.EQKEY AND B.PRTYPE = A.PRTYPE INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT C ON C.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE A.APKEY = #{apkey} AND A.EQKEY = #{eqkey} AND A.PRTYPE = #{prtype} AND C.DELYN = 'N'
